## What does this PR do?

A short description of the change and why it was made.

## Type of change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Style / UI update
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Config / dependency update

## Which area does this touch?

- [ ] UI (components, pages, styling)
- [ ] Backend / AI (API routes, generation, orchestrator)
- [ ] Database (schema, queries)
- [ ] Storage
- [ ] Both UI and backend

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `dev`
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] No `.env.local` or secrets accidentally included
- [ ] UI changes don't break existing pages
- [ ] Backend changes don't break the generation flow

## Screenshots (if UI change)

Before / after screenshots help with review.
